#below are x,y,r for run 66 on HL ran 1 hr on Jun 19th results obtained on Jun 19th

rotations = [300,240,120,120,240,300,300,240,240,150,180,60,60,180,0,240,300,300,240,240,60,180,240,300,60]

y_positions = [66,46,54,56,72,50,58,46,2,26,86,43,35,4,82,29,58,72,4,30,14,18,72,70,20]
